title: Redstone Clock
description: A lightweight Minecraft mod that adds a simple redstone clock and a simple pulse divider.
body:
# Abstract
This is a lightweight mod which only adds two blocks: Redstone Clock and Pulse Divider.

# Redstone Clock
The Redstone Clock is a redstone component, which lits for **a** ticks and then keeps unlit for **b** ticks every **a+b** ticks cycle (2 <= a, b <= 24000).

Without this mod, you may need at least a 7×3×5 area to achieve this. But now you only need to craft this 1×1×1 block and get it powered.

![Recipe for Redstone Clock](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VX298qOo/images/06add603823331b69452c51095d4e8faf87861fd.png)

![Redstone Clock](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VX298qOo/images/5ef58a758b6135ccca2a89c96942104ac5b1434a.png)

Right click the redstone clock to configure it:

![Configuration Menu of Redstone Clock](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VX298qOo/images/16260830af9c29d2e427abea0d0be03045274f9e.png)

Pulse Divider
The Pulse Divider is also a redstone component and output pulse signal after receiving **n** pulse signals (2 <= n <= 200).

![Recipe for Pulse Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VX298qOo/images/3ae2143e2e4b4426462432691eda1f2fa8282c43.png)

![Pulse Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VX298qOo/images/b093d33dc782fc4a81fed8c79ff5ca45d99bab03.png)

Right click the pulse divider to configure it:

![Configuration Menu of Pulse Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VX298qOo/images/d0d5bbcdc1b807241dd323289e8deeed22b28579.png)
